description: Foundations Patch 3 (29 May 2024) — Goldmane Pegasus Added, Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Goldmane Pegasus Added
sections.searchable_text: Goldmane Pegasus Added Goldmane Pegasus Armored Goldmane Pegasus

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Time required to interact with Siege Banners increased from 0.5s to 1.5s

sections.searchable_text: Changes Time required to interact with Siege Banners increased from 0.5s to 1.5s

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Bloody Reap (Infernal Scythe) Damage when target below 40% health: 240 → 220 Damage when target above 40% health: 126 → 120

subsections.heading: Hammers

subitems.text: Improved visual feedback to better communicate the actual area speed

subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Dreadladen Fighting (all Hammers) CC Strength Increase: 50% → 35% Improved the visual effect Groundbreaker (Polehammer) Improved visual feedback to better communicate the actual area speed Stun Duration: 2.5s → 2.7s

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Fling (Glaive) Base Damage: 50.90 → 56 1 Spirit Spear Charge: 81.43 → 90 2 Spirit Spear Charges: 122.15 → 134 3 Spirit Spear Charges: 173.04 → 190

subsections.heading: Swords

subitems.text: Charge now deals damage to all enemies it passes through
Enemies passed through receive 40% of the damage that the target receives

subsections.searchable_text: Swords Parry Strike (all Swords) Reflect Damage: 100% → 125% Charge (Claymore) Charge now deals damage to all enemies it passes through Enemies passed through receive 40% of the damage that the target receives

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Defensive Slam (all Maces) Duration: 3s → 4s Dreadladen Fighting (all Maces) CC Strength Increase: 50% → 35% Improved the visual effect Sacred Ground (all Maces) Area Duration: 4s → 3s Blessed Aurora (Oathkeepers) Increased max targets: 5 → 10 Healing range: 6m → 8m

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Dreadladen Fighting (all Quarterstaffs) Improved the visual effect

subsections.heading: War Gloves

subitems.text: Follow Through: For 4s, dash to the first target marked

subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Rushdown - Passive (War Gloves) Movement Speed: 20% → 30% Shockwave (all War Gloves) 1st Cast Cooldown: 4s → 3.5s 2nd Cast Cooldown: 6s → 5s Counter (all War Gloves) Added new combo attack

subsections.heading: Helmets

subitems.text: Can no longer be canceled by the caster

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Iceblock (Cleric Cowl) Can no longer be canceled by the caster Duration: 4.75s → 4s

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Life Steal Aura (Hellion Jacket) Damage when health above 80%: 20 → 16 Damage when health above 60%: 25 → 20 Damage when health above 40%: 30 → 24 Damage when health above 20%: 35 → 28 Damage when health below 20%: 40 → 32

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Axes Bloody Reap (Infernal Scythe) Bows Demon Arrow (Wailing Bow) Hammers Dreadladen Fighting (all Hammers) Groundbreaker (Polehammer) Spears Fling (Glaive) Swords Parry Strike (all Swords) Charge (Claymore) Maces Defensive Slam (all Maces) Dreadladen Fighting (all Maces) Sacred Ground (all Maces) Blessed Aurora (Oathkeepers) Quarterstaffs Dreadladen Fighting (all Quarterstaffs) War Gloves Rushdown - Passive (War Gloves) Shockwave (all War Gloves) Counter (all War Gloves) Helmets Iceblock (Cleric Cowl) Armors Life Steal Aura (Hellion Jacket) Damage when health above 80%: 20 → 16 Damage when health above 60%: 25 → 20 Damage when health above 40%: 30 → 24 Damage when health above 20%: 35 → 28 Damage when health below 20%: 40 → 32 Miscellaneous Dismounted mount range: 12m → 15m

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where VFX of stackable damage over time or healing over time spells on players in shape form would disappear when they transformed back into human form
Groundbreaker (Polehammer): Fixed issue where tooltip displayed the wrong cast range
Starfall (Astral Staff): Fixed issue where tooltip displayed the wrong energy cost
Gravitas (Morning Star): Fixed issue where tooltip displayed range incorrectly
Fixed issue where, in Streamer Mode, email addresses would be visible on login verification page
Fixed issue where opening the map of a neighboring region with Fortifications would show the wrong upgrades
Fixed issue where Herb Garden products were not correctly sorted by tier

items.text: Fixed issue where Shrine of Invisibility buff could cause mount to disappear in overcrowded regions
Fixed issue where players could get stuck in a trade state after disconnecting mid-trade
Fixed rare issue in duo mists where players in a party could briefly become hostile after Mists portal closed
Fixed rare issue in Yellow Zone Mists where picking up Wounded Wisps twice while in combat could cause PvP-flagging to persist after leaving the Mists
